categories.name: Windows
categories.description: Energy-efficient double and triple glazed window styles including casement, sash, tilt & turn and bay windows.

categories.name: Doors
categories.description: High-security front, back, French and patio doors in uPVC, composite and aluminium with multi-point locking.

finance_plans.name: 12 Months Interest Free Credit
finance_plans.description: Spread the cost of your installation over 12 equal monthly payments at 0% APR with no interest charges.

finance_plans.name: 24 Months Interest Free Credit
finance_plans.description: Pay monthly over two years with absolutely no interest to pay, subject to status and minimum spend.

finance_plans.name: Classic 36 Month Finance (9.9% APR)
finance_plans.description: A flexible three-year finance plan with a competitive fixed interest rate and no early repayment penalties.

finance_plans.name: Low Monthly 60 Month Finance (12.9% APR)
finance_plans.description: Keep repayments low by spreading the cost over up to five years at a fixed representative APR.

finance_plans.name: Buy Now, Pay in 12 Months
finance_plans.description: Nothing to pay for 12 months. Settle in full before the end of the deferral period to avoid interest, or spread the cost over a further term.

finance_plans.name: 6 Month Deferred Payment Plan
finance_plans.description: Delay your first payment for six months, then repay the balance with fixed monthly instalments.

finance_plans.name: Green Home 36 Month Plan (4.9% APR)
finance_plans.description: Discounted APR for energy-efficient windows and doors, fixed over a three-year term.

finance_plans.name: Premium 48 Month Plan (7.9% APR)
finance_plans.description: Spread the cost over four years with a low fixed interest rate and optional overpayments.

finance_plans.name: Windows Only 36 Month Plan (0% APR)
finance_plans.description: Exclusive interest-free credit for qualifying window installations up to 36 months, perfect for whole-house upgrades.

finance_plans.name: Eco Saver 60 Month Plan (5.9% APR)
finance_plans.description: Long-term low-rate finance for high performance A-rated windows and doors, ideal for larger projects.

offers.title: Spring Windows Event – 15% Off A-Rated Windows
offers.short_description: Save 15% on A-rated replacement windows when you order 6 or more frames this spring.
offers.long_description: For a limited time only, enjoy 15% off our entire range of A-rated uPVC and aluminium replacement windows when you order at least six frames in a single installation. Includes casement, tilt & turn, and bay windows. Offer applies to supply and fit and can be combined with selected finance plans. Book a free home consultation or send an online enquiry quoting the promo code below.
offers.terms_summary: Minimum 6 windows per order. Not valid on previous quotes or orders. Subject to survey and availability. Cannot be combined with other percentage discounts.

offers.title: 10% Off Secure Front & Back Doors
offers.short_description: Upgrade your entrance with 10% off selected uPVC and composite doors.
offers.long_description: Take 10% off the price of selected secure uPVC and composite front and back doors, including multi-point locking as standard. Includes installation and removal of your old door. Finance options available subject to status.
offers.terms_summary: Offer applies to qualifying door ranges only. One discount per household. Subject to survey.

offers.title: Bundle & Save – 20% Off Windows and Doors Package
offers.short_description: Order new windows and doors together and save 20% on the combined order value.
offers.long_description: When you replace both your windows and external doors in a single project, we’ll apply an automatic 20% discount to the combined order value. Ideal for full-property refurbishments and major upgrades. Includes free disposal of old windows and doors.
offers.terms_summary: Requires at least 4 windows and 1 external door on the same order. Not valid with other percentage offers.

offers.title: 0% APR Finance on Orders Over £2,500
offers.short_description: Pay monthly with 0% APR when you spend £2,500 or more on any products.
offers.long_description: Spread the cost of your home improvement with up to 24 months interest-free credit on orders of £2,500 or more. Available across our full range of windows and doors, subject to status and affordability checks.
offers.terms_summary: Credit subject to status. Minimum order value £2,500. Representative 0% APR over up to 24 months.

offers.title: Old Windows Trade-In Bonus – Extra £150 Off
offers.short_description: Get an extra £150 off when we remove 8 or more old windows.
offers.long_description: Replace at least eight of your existing windows and receive an additional £150 trade-in discount on top of any other qualifying offers. We’ll safely remove and recycle your old frames and glass at no extra cost.
offers.terms_summary: Minimum 8 windows. Can be combined with percentage discount offers unless stated otherwise on your quote.

offers.title: Free Triple Lock Upgrade on Front Doors
offers.short_description: Free upgrade to high security triple locking system on selected front doors.
offers.long_description: For a limited period, get a free upgrade to our premium triple locking security system when you order a qualifying front door. Increase security and peace of mind without increasing the cost.
offers.terms_summary: Available on selected front door ranges only. Upgrade applies per qualifying door ordered.

offers.title: Summer Multi-Room Windows Offer – 18% Off
offers.short_description: Save 18% when you replace windows in three or more rooms.
offers.long_description: Book a free survey and replace windows in at least three rooms to qualify for 18% off the window frames and glass. Ideal for phased whole-house upgrades.
offers.terms_summary: Minimum of three rooms and five windows. Not valid before the offer start date.

offers.title: Clearance – Up to 25% Off Selected Stock
offers.short_description: End-of-line windows and doors with up to 25% off while stocks last.
offers.long_description: We’re clearing space in our warehouse and offering up to 25% off selected stock-sized windows and doors. Perfect if you need a quick installation and your sizes match our remaining items.
offers.terms_summary: Limited to stock items only. When they’re gone, they’re gone. No rain checks.

reviews.title: Smooth Window Replacement and Noticeably Warmer Home
reviews.excerpt: From the first quote to fitting day, the team were professional and tidy. Our Birmingham terrace is much quieter and warmer.
reviews.full_text: We had eight white uPVC casement windows fitted in our 1930s terrace in Birmingham in January 2026. From the instant online quote through to the final survey, everything was clearly explained with no pressure. The fitters arrived on time, protected all our carpets and took the old windows away. The difference in warmth is huge and we can barely hear the traffic now. We’ve already noticed the heating is on less often. Would happily recommend them for window installations in Birmingham.

reviews.title: Great Service on Replacement Bedroom Windows
reviews.excerpt: New bedroom windows fitted in Birmingham just before winter – no more draughts and the fitters were very considerate.
reviews.full_text: We ordered three A-rated casement windows for our bedrooms in south Birmingham. The surveyor picked up a couple of tricky measurements but explained how they would work around them. Installation took just half a day and there was minimal mess. The rooms feel much less draughty and our condensation issues have gone. Overall very happy with the windows and the respectful installation team.

reviews.title: Secure New Front Door with Neat Finish
reviews.excerpt: The new composite front door looks fantastic and feels very secure.
reviews.full_text: I booked a free consultation to replace our tired old front door in Birmingham. The advisor brought plenty of samples and helped us choose a white composite front door with decorative double glazing and a multi-point lock. Installation was completed in a few hours and the finish around the frame is very neat. The door feels solid and secure compared to the old one.

reviews.title: Whole-House Window Upgrade in Manchester
reviews.excerpt: We replaced all 12 windows and the house is so much quieter.
reviews.full_text: Our semi-detached home in Manchester had very old single-glazed windows. We opted for 12 white uPVC casement windows with A-rated double glazing. The surveyor was thorough and made good suggestions for trickle vents and fire escape hinges. Installation took two days and the team cleaned up after themselves. Street noise is dramatically reduced and the house feels warmer.

reviews.title: Bay Window Transformation
reviews.excerpt: New bay window has transformed the front of the house.
reviews.full_text: We had the old wooden bay window at the front of our house in Leeds replaced with a modern uPVC bay using A-rated glass. The advisor helped us choose a style that matched the period look of the street. Installation was completed in one day and the plastering around the reveal was excellent. Very pleased with the finish.

reviews.title: New Windows and Doors Package in Birmingham
reviews.excerpt: We used the bundle offer for windows and doors and are very happy with the result.
reviews.full_text: We decided to replace both our windows and external doors at the same time in our Birmingham semi. The consultant explained the windows-and-doors bundle offer clearly so we knew what we were saving. We chose white casement windows and a matching front and back door. The project was completed over two days with minimal disruption. The house feels more secure and the exterior looks much smarter.

reviews.title: Patio Door Replacement in Bristol
reviews.excerpt: New sliding patio doors run smoothly and let in loads of light.
reviews.full_text: Our old patio doors in Bristol were fogged up and difficult to slide. We upgraded to new double-glazed uPVC sliders with toughened glass. The survey highlighted some rotten timber which the fitters replaced as part of the job. Everything was completed in a day and the new doors glide effortlessly.

reviews.title: Efficient Installation but Small Snag Quickly Resolved
reviews.excerpt: One small issue with a stiff handle was resolved quickly under aftercare.
reviews.full_text: We had six casement windows installed in our Birmingham home in June 2023. The work was carried out in a single day and the team cleaned up well. A week later one of the handles became stiff, but after a quick call to the aftercare team they booked a visit and adjusted it under warranty. Everything has been fine since and we’re pleased with the service.

reviews.title: New Conservatory with Matching Windows and Doors
reviews.excerpt: The conservatory blends perfectly with the existing house.
reviews.full_text: We added a rear conservatory to our property in Nottingham, including matching windows and French doors. The planning, survey and build stages were all well coordinated and the team kept us updated. The finished conservatory is bright, warm and looks like it was always part of the house.

reviews.title: Repair Work on Existing Windows
reviews.excerpt: Aftercare team fixed a minor condensation issue under warranty.
reviews.full_text: We had windows fitted in Birmingham in June 2022 and noticed some condensation between the panes on two openings a few months later. The aftercare team arranged an inspection and replaced the affected sealed units under warranty. Since then, everything has been fine and we’re happy with the way the issue was handled.

reviews.title: Flat Windows Replaced with Minimal Disruption
reviews.excerpt: The team worked around our work-from-home schedule and kept disruption to a minimum.
reviews.full_text: Living on the third floor of a London block, we were worried about how disruptive replacing our windows would be. The company arranged access and kept us updated on timings. All four casement windows were replaced in a day and the installers were careful around our furniture and computer equipment.

reviews.title: Good Value for Money on Kitchen and Lounge Windows
reviews.excerpt: Quote came in under budget and the final result looks smart.
reviews.full_text: We obtained several quotes for replacing our kitchen and lounge windows in Birmingham. This company was competitive on price and could schedule the work sooner than others. The new white uPVC frames look smart and the trickle vents help with ventilation. Overall good value for money.

service_areas.name: AB Postcodes – Full Coverage
service_areas.notes: Full installation and aftercare service available across AB postcode areas, including AB12 and surrounding districts.

service_areas.name: XY12 Central Zone
service_areas.notes: Priority service area with weekday evening appointment slots available for XY12 4 and XY12 5 sectors.

service_areas.name: Birmingham & Surrounds
service_areas.notes: Our main service region covering all Birmingham postcodes for windows, doors, and conservatories.

service_areas.name: Greater Manchester – Partial Coverage
service_areas.notes: Installation services available in most M postcodes. Some outer areas may be limited to survey-only depending on schedule.

service_areas.name: Leeds Urban Area
service_areas.notes: Full coverage for LS1–LS29. Rural outskirts may require additional travel time.

service_areas.name: Bristol & Avon
service_areas.notes: Windows and doors installation plus aftercare available across BS postcodes.

service_areas.name: London – Selected Boroughs
service_areas.notes: We currently serve selected boroughs in East, North, South East and South West London. Use the postcode checker for availability.

service_areas.name: Outside Standard Service Area
service_areas.notes: For postcodes outside our normal regions we are unable to offer installation, but may provide supply-only in some cases.

products.name: A-Rated White uPVC Casement Window
products.short_description: Popular A-rated white uPVC casement window with secure multi-point locking and internal glazing beads.
products.long_description: Our A-rated white uPVC casement window is designed for maximum energy efficiency and everyday practicality. Featuring multi-point locking, internal glazing beads and key-locking handles, it offers excellent security as well as reduced heat loss and outside noise. Ideal for most house types and suitable for bedrooms, lounges and kitchens.

products.name: Value White uPVC Casement Window (B-Rated)
products.short_description: Great-value white uPVC casement window with B-rated double glazing and secure locking.
products.long_description: A cost-effective white uPVC casement window offering solid performance for budget-conscious projects. This B-rated unit includes a multi-point espagnolette locking system, internal glazing beads and toughened glass where required. Ideal for rentals and secondary rooms while still improving warmth and security.

products.name: Anthracite Grey uPVC Casement Window (A+)
products.short_description: Modern anthracite grey casement window with A+ rated glass and enhanced security pack.
products.long_description: A contemporary anthracite grey uPVC casement window combining A+ rated double glazing with enhanced security upgrades. Multi-point locking, shootbolt hinges and optional laminated glass help protect your home, while the slimline profiles give a modern look perfect for refurbishments and new builds.

products.name: White uPVC Sliding Sash Window (A-Rated)
products.short_description: Traditional sliding sash look with modern uPVC performance and A-rated double glazing.
products.long_description: Retain the character of period properties with this white uPVC sliding sash window. It offers the appearance of timber sash with low-maintenance uPVC, A-rated double glazing and secure multi-point locking. Tilt-in sashes make cleaning easy from inside the property.

products.name: Grey uPVC Tilt & Turn Window (Triple Glazed)
products.short_description: High-performance triple-glazed tilt & turn window in modern grey finish.
products.long_description: Ideal for energy-conscious homeowners, this grey uPVC tilt & turn window features triple glazing and an A++ energy rating. The multi-point locking system and steel reinforced frames provide excellent security, while the tilt & turn operation offers flexible ventilation and easy cleaning.

products.name: White uPVC Bay Window (A-Rated)
products.short_description: A-rated white uPVC bay window system to transform the front of your home.
products.long_description: Create a light-filled feature at the front of your home with this white uPVC bay window. Built from A-rated casement sections with multi-point locking and shootbolt hinges, it delivers great insulation and security while maintaining a traditional bay appearance.

products.name: White uPVC Front Door with Double Glazing & Multi-Point Locking
products.short_description: Cheapest white uPVC front door with double glazing and secure multi-point locking.
products.long_description: A budget-friendly yet secure white uPVC front door featuring a double-glazed top panel and solid bottom section. The door includes a multi-point locking mechanism, steel reinforced frame and anti-snap cylinder for added security. Ideal as an affordable entrance upgrade while still improving warmth and noise reduction.

products.name: Deluxe White uPVC Front Door with Decorative Double Glazing
products.short_description: Decorative white uPVC front door with multi-point locking and upgraded A-rated glazing.
products.long_description: Step up from our entry-level range with this deluxe white uPVC front door. It features decorative double-glazed units, reinforced insulated panels and a high-security multi-point locking system with anti-snap cylinder and security hinges. Suitable for customers wanting extra style and performance.

products.name: White uPVC Front Door with Triple Glazed Panel
products.short_description: Energy-efficient white uPVC front door with triple-glazed unit and high security lock.
products.long_description: For maximum insulation at the front of your home, this white uPVC door uses a triple-glazed decorative unit combined with a multi-point locking system and laminated outer pane. Ideal for exposed locations and busy streets where both energy efficiency and sound reduction matter.

products.name: Anthracite Grey uPVC Front Door with Double Glazing
products.short_description: Modern grey uPVC front door with secure multi-point locking and A-rated glass.
products.long_description: A contemporary anthracite grey uPVC front door designed to match modern window frames and fascias. It includes a part-glazed decorative panel, A-rated double glazing and a multi-point locking system with reinforced frame and hinges. Perfect for style-conscious homeowners.

products.name: White Composite Front Door with Double Glazing
products.short_description: Premium white composite front door with secure multi-point locking and reinforced core.
products.long_description: This premium composite door combines a high-density reinforced core with a durable GRP skin for excellent security and weather resistance. The decorative double-glazed panel is A-rated, while the multi-point locking system and anti-snap cylinder provide peace of mind for busy front entrances.

products.name: White uPVC Back Door with Half-Glazed Panel
products.short_description: Practical white uPVC back door with toughened double glazing and multi-point lock.
products.long_description: A practical and secure white uPVC back door with a half-glazed panel using toughened double glazing. The door comes with a multi-point locking strip and locking handles, making it ideal for kitchen or utility room exits where light and security are both important.

products.name: White uPVC French Doors with Double Glazing
products.short_description: Classic white uPVC French doors with multi-point locking and toughened safety glass.
products.long_description: Open up your home to the garden with these white uPVC French doors. Featuring A-rated double glazing, toughened safety glass and multi-point locking with shootbolts to the slave door, they offer a secure and stylish way to bring in more natural light.

products.name: White uPVC Sliding Patio Door (2-Panel)
products.short_description: Smooth-running 2-panel white uPVC sliding patio door with secure locking.
products.long_description: Upgrade old patio doors with this smooth-running 2-panel white uPVC sliding system. It features toughened double glazing, anti-lift blocks and a multi-point locking system to help secure larger glass areas. Ideal for lounge and dining room openings onto the garden.

products.name: Mixed Windows & Doors Package (2025 Spec)
products.short_description: Archived 2025 package including 6 casement windows, 1 front door and 1 patio door.
products.long_description: A pre-configured 2025 specification package combining six white uPVC A-rated casement windows, one composite-style front entrance and one uPVC patio door. All items feature multi-point locking and double glazing. This configuration is maintained for reference against archived quotations.
